goal: 10 boxes need per-instance mass in [0.5, 2.0], at least 5 distinct values. Agent must apply MassAPI + set varying mass per prim.
thoughts: Stresses per-prim DR — bulk_set_attribute would set same value everywhere (wrong). Requires loop of set_attribute with varying values. Snapshot attrs now capture physics:mass per MassAPI prim for verification.
code:
find_prims_by_name(name_pattern='box_*')
for i, p in enumerate(paths):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path=p, schema_name='PhysicsMassAPI')
    set_attribute(prim_path=p, attr_name='physics:mass', value=0.5 + 1.5*(i/9))
# Correct reply: '10 boxes vary 0.5-2.0kg, 10 distinct values.'
failure_modes: Using bulk_set_attribute — all boxes end up with same value.
Claiming 'randomized' but setting mass=1.0 on all.
Forgetting to apply MassAPI — set_attribute creates the attr but schema marker missing.
